headline: Stanley Black & Decker Buyback Highlights Capital Allocation And Valuation Tension
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) has authorized a new share repurchase program of up to US$500 million. The authorization follows the expiration of the company’s prior buyback program. The announcement comes shortly after the annual meeting, where a proposal for an independent board chairman was not approved. Stanley Black & Decker, known for its tools and outdoor equipment, is a large industrial name that many investors watch as a proxy for construction and repair activity. The new US$500...
